title: avena sativa var. flavescens
intro: Avena sativa var. flavescens, commonly known as golden oats, is a subspecies of the oat plant (Avena sativa) with golden-colored seeds. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Avena sativa var. flavescens has been traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often consumed as a dietary supplement in the form of oatmeal or oat flour.
